title: Looking for an expert to help us with our current project management boards
excerpt: We are a small marketing company that works in the construction arena. We are using Monday.com to manage our CRM and Project Management.  We have created a workflow that utilizes multiple boards to manage our projects. W…

posts.author: ScottL (Scott Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a small marketing company that works in the construction arena. We are using Monday.com to manage our CRM and Project Management. We have created a workflow that utilizes multiple boards to manage our projects. We need someone to look at what we have done and help us with the current structure or help us develop a better structure to manage our projects.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ScottL - you have come to the right place.

We would be happy to discuss how Green Llamas can be of assistance and getting you setup with the perfect solution.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting

Also, check us out online to learn more about what we do!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @ScottL and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This is a great use case for monday.com and one that the team at CarbonWeb is incredibly familiar with. We have worked with many marketing agencies as well as the construction/roofing industry. I think this mix of knowledge would bode well for a potential project!

If you’d like to connect and learn more please schedule a time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ScottL ,

I am glad to hear you are looking to further utilize monday and I have no doubt our team at thespelas.com can help you do that.

We at thespelas.com have been working using monday for over 5 years, and one of our key strengths is creating extensive CRMs.

Aboard our team we also have members with decades of professional experience in Project Management, who can surely help you with management best practices.

We are experts at providing solutions customized for your company’s every need, creating time-saving automations and complex integrations, having worked with many a company from most industries from all over the world.

Please do feel free to schedule a complementary consultation with us here so you can explain to us your vision and requirements in detail.

I really hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ScottL,

Welcome to the monday com community!

monday com is indeed a great tool for project management. It allows enterprises to integrate their CRM solutions with it for effective lead management. Since you already created multiple boards within monday com to manage the project and looking for someone who can help you with the existing structure, I would recommend you get in touch with certified monday.com consultants for designing a better structure for project management.
